revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-225

Alternative term: Stanchion pillar

A vertical load-bearing member designed to resist compression and buckling.


Note: 1 A column is made of concrete or masonry.


Note: 2 A stanchion is made of iron or steel.


Note: 3 A pillar is made of stone or cast iron, and is usually of circular cross section.

{{IALAFooter}}
